notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Nolan Gorman out at 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Masyn Winn rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Jordan Walker to 3rd. Nolan Gorman out at 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jordan Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jordan Walker grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Jordan Walker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Chourio reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn. Sal Frelick scores. Christian Yelich to 2nd.
